medium: Light gray stone with black accretions on surface
creditline: Harvard Art Museums/Arthur M. Sackler Museum, Bequest of Gerhardt Liebmann
department: Department of Ancient and Byzantine Art & Numismatics
description: Possibly represents an offering to the Baboon God Thoth. It has been suggested that it is a royal stele due to its large size. Currently covered with bitumen and broken from the base at the bottom (12/2008)
title: Relief fragment with Baboon
